mem.description: Checkpoint memory, chunk sessions, commit to git, reindex
mem.instructions:
When the user runs /mem, execute the following steps in order:
1. Update ## CHECKPOINT at the top of memory/MEMORY.md (brief status, max 15 lines)
2. Run: python3 <WORKSPACE_PATH>/scripts/sessions_to_chunks.py ~/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions/ <WORKSPACE_PATH>/memory/sessions/
3. Run: cd <WORKSPACE_PATH>/memory && git add -A && git commit -m "mem: checkpoint $(date +%Y-%m-%d-%H%M)" && git push
4. Run: openclaw memory index
5. Confirm to user: what was saved, how many chunks, git status
